'''Tel IV''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Halthor sector/Legends|Halthor sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==Description==
Tel IV was covered with dense [[Forest/Legends|rainforests]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Sliideptra]], a [[Species/Legends|species]] of large annelidians.<ref name="CotG" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[Jason Fry]] confirmed that the [[Tel Minor system/Legends|Tel Minor system]] was invented to account for discrepancies between the different sources about the planet Tel IV.<ref name="Atlas">{{JCFCite|url=posts/31618818|board=Literature|thread=The Essential Atlas and Galactic Cartography: Official Discussion|user=[[Jason Fry|jasonfy]]|date=2011-03-26|time=10:52 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20191013233754/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-essential-atlas-and-galactic-cartography-official-discussion.21938930/page-163|quote=Of that list of systems, Gultanna, Manoe, Opitha Tren and Thory Prime were created for the appendix, basically for bookkeeping purposes so every sector would be associated with at least one system. The others are all established worlds.}}</ref>

==Sources==
*<!-- 1994-06-XX -->''[[Creatures of the Galaxy]]''
